RadioStation.title: Radio Station
RadioStation.description: A radio station with streaming details.

name.description: The name of the radio station.

streamingUrl.description: The URL for the audio stream.

imageUrl.description: The URL for the station's logo or image.

city.description: The city where the station is located.

genre.description: The genre of the radio station.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A message sent in the community chat.

CarouselItem.title: Carousel Item
CarouselItem.description: An item displayed in the home screen carousel.

url.description: The image URL for the carousel item.

title.description: The title of the carousel item.

subtitle.description: The subtitle of the carousel item.

order.description: The display order of the item.

adminPassword.description: The password for the admin area.

updatedAt.description: When the settings were last updated.

/radio_stations/{stationId}.description: Collection of radio stations added by users.

/carousel_items/{itemId}.description: Collection of carousel items for the home screen.
